description: Index of all subsidiary legislation (regulations, orders, and rules) made under the Personal Data Protection Act 2010 (Act 709)

regulations.title: Personal Data Protection Regulations 2013
regulations.subject: General regulations prescribing forms, conditions, and procedures under the Act

regulations.title: Personal Data Protection (Class of Data Users) Order 2013
regulations.subject: Prescribes the 13 classes of data users required to register with the Commissioner

amendments.description: Minor amendment to clarify the description of certain classes

regulations.title: Personal Data Protection (Class of Data Users) (Amendment) Order 2016
regulations.subject: Amendment to the Class of Data Users Order 2013

regulations.title: Personal Data Protection (Registration of Data User) Regulations 2013
regulations.subject: Registration procedures, forms, and certificate requirements for data users

regulations.title: Personal Data Protection (Fees) Regulations 2013
regulations.subject: Fee schedule for registration, renewal, access requests, and other matters

regulations.title: Personal Data Protection (Compounding of Offences) Regulations 2016
regulations.subject: Procedures and compound amounts for compoundable offences under the Act
